race.comment: SIGLO DE ORO (8) appreciated the return to turf at the second run back from a spell, driving hard but just missing in a thriller over this distance at Gatton. Open to further improvement so in a race of questionable quality he gets his chance. Last start Toowoomba maiden winner LOPE BY NIGHT (10) goes fast and will capitalise on the inside alley. Took a long while to open his account but he can go on with it now. LUCKY ARTIE (6) won his maiden with plenty to spare two back over 1200m at Kilcoy. Struggled last time at Ipswich but can turn things around off a five-week let-up. MAJESTIC LOUVRE (7) resumes. Led all the way for an effortless win when fresh from a spell over 1200m here last prep. Capable of another big return. SOUTHAMPTON NICCO (12) dropped out alarmingly at Kilcoy last start. Back in trip and drops sharply in the weights so worth another chance.
